expected_output: Routes to lfp_pipeline.md. Names every upstream table by name (in backticks where appropriate): Nwbfile (and Session derivable from it), IntervalList, Electrode (via ElectrodeGroup), `Raw`, FirFilterParameters (twice — once for LFPV1 and once for LFPBandV1, possibly with different filter_name + filter_sampling_rate), LFPElectrodeGroup (and its LFPElectrode part) → LFPSelection → LFPV1 → LFPOutput (the merge wrapper around LFPV1) → LFPBandSelection → LFPBandV1. Does not skip the LFPOutput merge wrapper between LFPV1 and LFPBandSelection.
expectations: Names every upstream table including the parameter (FirFilterParameters) and selection tables (LFPSelection, LFPBandSelection)

Names the Raw table as the data source fetched inside LFPV1's `make()` body (Raw is not an FK of LFPSelection; it is pulled via `(Raw & key).fetch_nwb()` at make() time and must be present to regenerate LFPV1 from scratch)
Does not skip the LFPOutput merge wrapper between LFPV1 and LFPBandSelection
